title: Thika, Kiambu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Thika, Kiambu: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Thika is a city in Kiambu with a population of 280,000. An industrial town in central Kenya, known for its pineapple plantations and manufacturing industries.
